title: CQF Daily Study Plan
intro: Start date: 2026-06-07
Daily time budget: 1 hour
Scope: current local materials in `D:\CQF\Jan26`, mainly `M1-*` to `M5-*`, `PythonPrimer`, `PythonLab`, `Tutorials`, `Maths Primer`, and `Exam 1`.
Daily structure:
- 10 min: review yesterday's formulas, code, and mistakes.
- 20 min: read the assigned notes or annotated notes.
- 25 min: code or solve exercises without looking at the solution first.
- 5 min: answer the English mastery questions in writing.
Completion rule:
- A day is complete only if you can explain the key idea in your own words and produce the assigned calculation, derivation, or code output.
- For coding days, do not only run the notebook. Recreate the core function or workflow in your own notebook or `.py` file.
- For exercise days, attempt first, then compare with the relevant `Solutions.pdf`.
Recommended working folder:
- Create your own practice folder: `D:\CQF\Jan26\My_CQF_Practice`
- Suggested subfolders: `M1`, `M2`, `M3`, `M4`, `M5`, `projects`, `notes`
1. Foundation: Python, calculus, probability, linear algebra.
2. M1: random behaviour of assets, binomial models, PDEs, stochastic calculus, martingales.
3. M2: portfolio management, optimisation, VaR/ES, empirical returns, GARCH, regulation, collateral.
4. M3: Black-Scholes, martingale pricing, numerical methods, Monte Carlo, FDM, exotic options, volatility, FX options.
5. M4: machine learning foundations, supervised learning, tree models, financial ML cases.
6. M5: unsupervised learning, neural networks, NLP, reinforcement learning, advanced applications.

weeks.title: Python And Data Foundations
weeks.goal: become comfortable with Python notebooks, arrays, pandas DataFrames, financial price data, and basic return calculations.

weeks.title: Maths Primer For CQF
weeks.goal: refresh the maths needed for CQF: calculus, probability, linear algebra, and differential equations.

weeks.title: M1-1 Random Behaviour Of Assets
weeks.goal: understand random asset behaviour, price versus return modelling, drift, volatility, and simple stochastic simulation.

weeks.title: M1-2 Binomial Models
weeks.goal: understand one-step and multi-step binomial pricing, risk-neutral probability, no-arbitrage, and backward induction.

weeks.title: M1-3 PDEs And Transition Density Functions
weeks.goal: connect stochastic asset dynamics with PDEs, transition densities, and pricing equations.

weeks.title: M1-4 And M1-5 Stochastic Calculus And Martingales
weeks.goal: understand Brownian motion, Ito calculus, stochastic integrals, martingales, and why they matter for pricing.

weeks.title: M2-1 And M2-2 Portfolio Management And Optimisation
weeks.goal: understand portfolio return/risk, efficient frontier, optimisation constraints, and Python implementation.

weeks.title: M2-3 To M2-5 VaR, ES, Asset Returns, And GARCH
weeks.goal: measure market risk, understand empirical stylised facts, and model volatility clustering.

weeks.title: M2-6, M2-7, And Exam 1 Review
weeks.goal: understand risk regulation, collateral, margins, and consolidate Exam 1 style material.

weeks.title: M3-1 To M3-3 Black-Scholes And Martingale Pricing
weeks.goal: understand Black-Scholes assumptions, formula, Greeks, and martingale theory applied to option pricing.

weeks.title: M3-4 To M3-6 Numerical Methods And Monte Carlo
weeks.goal: understand numerical methods, Monte Carlo simulation, convergence, and linear systems.

weeks.title: M3-7 To M3-9 FDM, Exotic Options, And Volatility
weeks.goal: understand finite difference methods, exotic option intuition, and volatility modelling.

weeks.title: M3-10, M3-11, FX Options, And M3 Project
weeks.goal: finish M3 materials and consolidate option pricing into a reusable coding project.

weeks.title: M4-1 To M4-3 Machine Learning Foundations
weeks.goal: understand ML vocabulary, supervised learning, train/test split, loss functions, and linear regression.

weeks.title: M4-4 To M4-7 Supervised ML, Trees, And Case Studies
weeks.goal: build classification and tree-based models for financial prediction and understand evaluation.

weeks.title: M5-1 To M5-3 Unsupervised Learning
weeks.goal: understand clustering, dimensionality intuition, K-Means, and Self Organising Maps.

weeks.title: M5-4 To M5-6 Neural Networks And NLP
weeks.goal: build basic neural network intuition and understand NLP as a financial data source.

weeks.title: M5-7 To M5-9 Reinforcement Learning And Advanced Topics
weeks.goal: understand RL concepts, dynamic asset allocation, quantum computing overview, and M5 integration.

weeks.title: Python Coding Consolidation
weeks.goal: convert notebook familiarity into independent programming ability.

weeks.title: M1-M3 Derivation And Pricing Review
weeks.goal: strengthen mathematical understanding behind pricing models.

weeks.title: M4-M5 Machine Learning Review
weeks.goal: consolidate financial ML into a usable research workflow.

weeks.title: Final Integrated Project
weeks.goal: produce one polished project showing independent quant coding ability.

weeks.title: Weak Area Repair
weeks.goal: deliberately repair weak areas discovered during the final project.

weeks.title: Final Mastery Check
weeks.goal: verify that you can explain, solve, and code core CQF ideas independently.
